message:
✨ Unify feedback modals: user profile dropdown now opens same Contribute dialog (#1254)

- User profile dropdown feedback button now opens the FeatureRequestModal
  (same as top navbar bug icon and card bug buttons) instead of the old
  FeedbackModal that redirected to GitHub
- Add subtle coin reward info to type selector buttons and submit button
- Add coin subtitle to modal header showing reward amounts
- Add LinkedIn share button in activity tab for sharing contribution stats
- Remove old FeedbackModal from Navbar (no longer needed)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
